name: Altitude Reserve Visa Infinite Card
perks: 5x points on prepaid hotels and car rentals via the Rewards Center
3x points on eligible travel and mobile wallet purchases (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay)
Real-Time Rewards: automatically redeem points for travel and dining purchases at a higher value
$325 annual travel credit for travel and dining purchases
12 Priority Pass Select lounge visits per year
Global Entry or TSA PreCheck credit (up to $100)
Complimentary Silvercar discount (25% off Audi rentals)
Visa Infinite benefits including concierge service
Points do not expire as long as account is open
drawbacks: Must bank with U.S. Bank to apply (existing customer requirement strongly preferred)
Mobile wallet 3x cap can be complex to maximize
Lounge access limited to 12 visits per year via Priority Pass
Points best redeemed through Real-Time Rewards or Rewards Center
No airline or hotel transfer partners
